title: Twist 'n' Sound Caterpillar
features: 🐛 Twist 'n' Sound Caterpillar – Sensory Baby Toy (6 Months+) 🧠 Interactive Exploration Our Twist 'n' Sound Caterpillar is the perfect sensory toy for babies, designed to encourage captivating exploration and discovery. It supports early learning through fun, hands-on interaction.
🌈 Vibrant Colours & Textures Engaging caterpillar with twisting body segments. Encourages fine motor skills and sensory development. Bright colours and a friendly face help keep little ones engaged.
🔊 Fun Sounds for Cause & Effect Learning Features clicking and rattling sounds as baby twists and shakes the toy. Helps babies understand cause and effect through sound-based feedback.
🏗️ Encourages Motor Skills Develops fine motor skills and hand-eye coordination. Perfect for grasping, squeezing, and exploring different tactile features.
🎁 Ideal Gift for Babies A thoughtful, high-quality gift for new parents or baby showers. Sure to become a cherished favourite during playtime. Recommended Age: 6 months and up
description: Give your little one the perfect start with our baby sensory learning toys, designed to support early development, fine motor skills, and sensory exploration. Choose from three fun and educational toys – each sold separately – to suit your baby’s needs and interests.
